Details List.SourceString: Parties can join Battle Stage together, but each player competes individually!
Details List.LocalizedString: Parties can join Battle Stage together, but each player competes individually!

Details List.SourceString: Eliminated players can choose to spectate and watch their party members play the rest of the setlist.
Details List.LocalizedString: Eliminated players can choose to spectate and watch their party members play the rest of the setlist.

Details List.SourceString: You can also launch a private Battle Stage match and compete against just your party members.  In private matches you can choose which songs to play and use your owned Jam Tracks.
Details List.LocalizedString: You can also launch a private Battle Stage match and compete against just your party members.  In private matches you can choose which songs to play and use your owned Jam Tracks.
